## Proposed solution

## Out of scope?

The project's positioning is *static, citable risk explanation*. We deliberately
won't do:

- Physical simulation of floods or quakes
- "If today's M7" damage estimates
- Real-time disaster warnings
- User accounts or history

If your request touches any of those, please explain why it still fits.
